title: The Bob Mod
description: A silly mod that adds Bob and a bunch of other stuff
body:
Note : _This mod is not finished, some bugs may occur from time to time._

**Welcome to the World of Bob,**

A mod that adds many SILLY and GOOFY mobs, one being _Bob_ - the silly guy you can control a army of and the guy that is used as the mod icon

![This is Bob from a toy line in a universe I made](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c60f6aae3c784b055f7b2c28de44d36e0d9a6e64.gif)

**Alright it's about time for a whole yap session**

To get a Bob you need to find an Ancient Ruin, a structure abandoned by it's creators after the downfall of the toy factory known as "Grim Toy Factories" - there you will find a strange vessel that can be sheared to revive the being known as _Mega Bob_. A Mega Bob can be right clicked with a cobblestone to make a Bob, it can also be right clicked with various other objects like bricks and a custom item in the mod.

As a worker for the new Grim Toy Factory you have the option to complete the goal of taking over the world and collecting every treasure in the mod to unlock the key to another world _(Note: This hasn't been added yet but WILL be in the near future)_

Btw this mod is partially inspired by the Nintendo game **PIKMIN** (my favorite game)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Planned Features :**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Bosses
- More enemies
- A way to convert Bobs back into cobblestone
- Polishing (as in textures & models)

</details>

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
